ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_scores" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene entry */,
  "order_num" INTEGER /* Order of the score in the dataset */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score representing the gene expression level */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight associated with the gene score */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visualization purposes */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label categorizing the gene */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "order_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_scores_color_code FOREIGN KEY ("color_code") REFERENCES colors ("color_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_scores_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES gene_labels ("label_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label's significance */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the label */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color entry */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal color code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color's significance or use */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the color entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the color entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated gene id */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition applied to the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_experiments_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_scores ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history record */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated gene id */,
  "order_num" INTEGER /* Order number of the score at the time of change */,
  "previous_score" INTEGER /* Previous score before the change */,
  "previous_weight" REAL /* Previous weight before the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_history_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_scores ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_scores ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated gene id */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Level of the gene expression */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene expression was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene expression was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id")
)
